mapper.insert: INSERT INTO packing_inbound_scan ( packing_order_id, detail_id, unit_type, unit_no, qty, scan_status, stock_applied ) VALUES ( #{packingOrderId}, #{detailId}, #{unitType}, #{unitNo}, #{qty}, 'WAITING', 'N' )
mapper.select:
SELECT pis.*,
CASE WHEN pis.unit_type IN ('UNPLANNED_BOX', 'UNPLANNED_EACH') THEN up.product_type ELSE pod.product_type END AS product_type,
CASE WHEN pis.unit_type IN ('UNPLANNED_BOX', 'UNPLANNED_EACH') THEN up.model_name ELSE pod.model_name END AS model_name,
CASE WHEN pis.unit_type IN ('UNPLANNED_BOX', 'UNPLANNED_EACH') THEN up.color ELSE pod.color END AS color,
CASE WHEN pis.unit_type IN ('UNPLANNED_BOX', 'UNPLANNED_EACH') THEN up.hardness ELSE pod.hardness END AS hardness
FROM packing_inbound_scan pis LEFT JOIN packing_order_detail pod ON pis.detail_id = pod.id AND pis.unit_type IN ('BOX', 'EACH')
LEFT JOIN unplanned_purchase up ON pis.detail_id = up.id AND pis.unit_type IN ('UNPLANNED_BOX', 'UNPLANNED_EACH')
WHERE pis.packing_order_id = #{packingOrderId} ORDER BY pis.detail_id ASC, pis.unit_type ASC, pis.unit_no ASC
SELECT * FROM packing_inbound_scan WHERE detail_id = #{detailId} ORDER BY unit_type ASC, unit_no ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM packing_inbound_scan WHERE packing_order_id = #{packingOrderId} AND scan_status = 'WAITING'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM packing_inbound_scan WHERE packing_order_id = #{packingOrderId} AND scan_status = 'DONE'
SELECT IFNULL(SUM(qty), 0) FROM packing_inbound_scan WHERE detail_id = #{detailId} AND scan_status = 'DONE' AND stock_applied = 'N'
SELECT * FROM packing_inbound_scan WHERE packing_order_id = #{packingOrderId} AND scan_status = 'DONE' AND stock_applied = 'N' ORDER BY detail_id ASC, unit_type ASC, unit_no ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE packing_inbound_scan SET scan_status = 'DONE', scanned_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND scan_status = 'WAITING'
UPDATE packing_inbound_scan SET stock_applied = 'Y', stock_applied_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND stock_applied = 'N'
UPDATE packing_inbound_scan SET scan_status = 'WAITING', scanned_at = NULL WHERE id = #{id} AND stock_applied = 'N'
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM packing_inbound_scan WHERE detail_id = #{unplannedId} AND unit_type IN ('UNPLANNED_BOX', 'UNPLANNED_EACH')
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM packing_inbound_scan WHERE detail_id = #{unplannedId} AND unit_type IN ('UNPLANNED_BOX', 'UNPLANNED_EACH') AND scan_status = 'WAITING'
